evals.prompt: Audit this Shopify store and tell me the top issues: example.com
evals.expected_output: A full SEO + GEO + AEO audit with exact counts, scope labels, AI bot access check, and prioritized actions across all dimensions.

evals.prompt: Check if this Shopify store is visible to AI search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity: example.com
evals.expected_output: A GEO-focused audit checking robots.txt AI bot rules, llms.txt, entity signals, content extractability, and citation-worthiness.

evals.prompt: Review this Shopify SEO audit report and tell me what is real, what is overstated, and what is missing: themancompany.com
evals.expected_output: A report-review that verifies claims, classifies by importance, and flags missing GEO/AEO dimensions if the original audit did not cover them.

evals.prompt: Check whether this Shopify store can win featured snippets and answer box positions: example.com
evals.expected_output: An AEO-focused audit checking FAQ schema, question headings, answer paragraph format, comparison tables, and snippet readiness.

evals.prompt: Run a full store analysis on jhumka-8052.myshopify.com
evals.expected_output: Complete SEO + GEO + AEO audit with catalog-wide product data, sampled HTML analysis, prioritized findings with proof and fixes, and Top 5 actions.

evals.prompt: Is this Shopify store optimized for voice search and AI shopping assistants?
evals.expected_output: Combined GEO + AEO audit focusing on voice readiness, AI bot access, product schema completeness, and content extractability.
